rationale: Educ. Code §31.027 governs publisher obligations to provide instructional material samples to school districts. It is wholly unrelated to the Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amount. No conflict exists.
quote: A publisher shall provide each school district and open-enrollment charter school with information that fully describes each of the publisher's submitted instructional materials.
_note: Rule text concerns instructional materials publishing; no nexus to property tax homestead exemption.
